zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Cloninger於1695年出生在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格時，她的父親Johan Philip Cloniger30歲，母親Mrs. Johann Philipp Cloninnger28歲。她於1727年與Andreas Rudolph Schumacher在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1752年在美國賓夕法尼亞州波藍德門羅 堂史普艾倫享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Cloninger于1695年出生在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格时，她的父亲Johan Philip Cloniger30岁，母亲Mrs. Johann Philipp Cloninnger28岁。她于1727年与Andreas Rudolph Schumacher在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1752年在美国宾夕法尼亚州波藍德門羅 堂史普艾倫享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cloninger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of German Kloninger, a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place. Kloningers Mühle (Kloninger's Mill) near Langenlonsheim on the Nahe river attests to the surname in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: French Monarchy
historicEvents.description: The French monarchy started way before the 1700s, but for the most part the major events of history took place during this time before the French Revolution started. This was known as the Bourbon Dynasty. Louis XIV the Great, Louis XV the Beloved, Louis XVI the Restorer of French Liberty, and Louis XVII all reigned during this time.
Historical Boundaries 1750: Cumberland, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Cumberland, Pennsylvania, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Cloninger was born in 1695, in Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, her father, Johan Philip Cloniger, was 30 and her mother, Mrs. Johann Philipp Cloninnger, was 28. She married Andreas Rudolph Schumacher in 1727, in Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1752, in Allen, Monroe Township, Cumberland, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 57.

Elle a épousé Andreas Rudolph Schumacher en 1727, à Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 1 fille. ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cloninger(이)가 1695년 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 클리보우르그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Johan Philip Cloniger(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Johann Philipp Cloninnger(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1727년 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 클리보우르그에서 Andreas Rudolph Schumacher(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1752년 미국 펜실베이니아 주 쿠벌랜드 먼로 타운시프 앨렌에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Cloninger родилась в 1695 г. в местности клибург, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция, её отцу по имени Johan Philip Cloniger было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Johann Philipp Cloninnger, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Andreas Rudolph Schumacher в 1727 г. в местности клибург, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1752 г. в местности аллен, монро тоуншип, кумбирланд, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 57 лет.
